title: TRANSFORMATIONAL CLASSES - 211info
text: LOVE INC OF LINN COUNTY TRANSFORMATIONAL CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers faith-based classes such as Work Life Class for job and life-skills curriculum to promote job readiness and interviewing skills, Boundaries Class for understanding how to set healthy boundaries in relationships, Faith & Finances for developing practical money management skills, and Affirming Potential that helps individuals set and achieve goals. All classes begin with a meal. 1606 Santiam Road SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Varies Email (541) 924-5683 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 924-5683 Diana [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for schedule or to register for a class FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Linn County Services: Financial Literacy Training Life Skills Education Relationship Workshops Other Services Offered At This Location: MATERIAL GOODS - DRESS FOR SUCCESS CAREER CLOSET MATERIAL GOODS - GAP MINISTRIES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LOVE INC OF LINN COUNTY
